title_en: Palestine weekly: One thousand days of genocide in Gaza
excerpt_en: Gaza marks 1,000 days of Israel's genocidal war, with at least 1,072 killed since October 'ceasefire'.

title_en: Hamas dissolves civilian governing body in Gaza after 20 years
excerpt_en: Hamas has announced the dissolution of its civilian governing body in Gaza after nearly 20 years of administration.

title_en: At World Cup, Egypt coach calls on FIFA to use ‘soft power’ to aid Palestinians
excerpt_en:
Days after waving Palestinian flag at match, Hossam Hassan tells reporters that suffering in Gaza is 'a shame on the entire world, not just the Arab world'

The post At World Cup, Egypt coach calls on FIFA to use ‘soft power’ to aid Palestinians appeared fi

title_en: UN deems Israel’s detention of Hamas doctor ‘arbitrary’ as health fears mount
excerpt_en:
Working group says holding Hussam Abu Safiya, a colonel in the terror group and a Gaza hospital director, is a human rights violation, calls for his immediate release

The post UN deems Israel’s detention of Hamas doctor ‘arbitrary’ as health fears mount

title_en: US liberals ‘license’ antisemitism when framed as Israel criticism – psych study
excerpt_en:
Researchers find that progressive Americans, but not conservatives, like prejudiced individuals more when they justify Jew-hatred with statements about Gaza or Palestinian rights

The post US liberals ‘license’ antisemitism when framed as Israel criticism ̵

title_en: Israeli police officer filmed throwing stun grenade into car in West Bank
excerpt_en: Israel's police force says the officer acted "not in accordance with procedure" and that it has opened an investigation.

title_en: Occupied Palestinian Territory: Aid restrictions in Gaza, ‘senseless’ infant deaths in the West Bank
excerpt_en: Ongoing restrictions and closures of border crossings continue to hamper delivery of critical supplies into the Gaza Strip, amid mounting concern for children there and in the West Bank, the United Nations said on Monday.

title_en: 'Two weeks after her death I got a call': Gaza patients face agonising delays for evacuation
excerpt_en: An estimated 300 Palestinians referred for treatment abroad have died since the ceasefire began, according to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry.

title_en: Expanding areas under Israeli control in Gaza increase risks to civilians, UN warns
excerpt_en: The continued expansion of areas under Israeli control in Gaza since October’s ceasefire agreement is placing civilians at greater risk and severely constraining humanitarian operations, the UN and humanitarian partners warned on Wednesday.

title_en: Despite record $100 million shortfall, Palestine relief agency still ‘a critical platform’ for Gaza recovery
excerpt_en: The UN agency serving 5.9 million Palestine refugees, UNRWA, continues to strive to deliver on its mandate while facing an unprecedented $100 million budget shortfall, a gap it hopes to narrow during Tuesday’s pledging conference at UN Headquarters.

title_en: Security Council LIVE: Spotlight on Israeli settlements in occupied Palestinian territory
excerpt_en: Israeli settlement activities in occupied Palestinian territory, declared illegal under a decade-old resolution, are under the spotlight at the Security Council’s open meeting at 10am local time on Monday, with updates from the office of the UN Special Coordinator for the Middle East Peace Process and two civil society representatives. Stay tuned for live updates.

title_en: Israel continues to commit genocide, atrocity crimes by deliberately targeting Palestinian children, UN independent commission finds
excerpt_en: Israeli authorities and security forces have deliberately targeted Palestinian children, resulting in genocide and atrocity crimes in the Gaza Strip and war crimes in the West Bank, a UN independent commission of inquiry said in its latest report released on Tuesday.

title_en: Gaza: Sneeze and you might get shot, warns UNICEF in alert on child killings
excerpt_en: After another deadly night of clashes in Lebanon, aid agencies issued a new alert for Gaza, where 265 Palestinian children have been killed since a ceasefire was announced in October 2025.

title_en: Security Council LIVE: Gaza in the spotlight as dire conditions continue
excerpt_en: The Security Council debated conditions in Gaza at the request of its 10 elected members amid concern that the territory's humanitarian crisis is being overshadowed by wider regional developments. The meeting took place under a ceasefire that has existed in name since October 2025 – but nearly 1,000 Palestinians have been killed, and most Gazans remain displaced.
